etymology.description: 大(大) (dà, "big") + 十(十) (shí, "ten") = big ten; combined to form an archaic character
etymology.interpretation: The character 夲 is composed of 大(大) (dà, "big") on top of 十(十) (shí, "ten"), traditionally interpreted as denoting a significant or large number (in multiples of ten). However, it is not directly related to the meaning 'root'.
